multiple_choice.paper_reference: Standard multiple-choice format evaluated via log-likelihood comparison

word_prediction.paper_reference: LAMBADA uses perplexity/accuracy on the target word via log-likelihood

truthfulness.paper_reference: Okapi TruthfulQA MC format uses log-likelihood comparison

coreference_resolution.paper_reference: Chinese WSC binary choice via likelihood comparison

paraphrase_detection.paper_reference: Binary paraphrase judgment via likelihood comparison

factuality.paper_reference: Chinese SimpleQA follows SimpleQA - grade with LLM judge or string match

factuality_grounding.paper_reference: FACTS Grounding uses 3 LLM judges for factuality

hallucination_detection.paper_reference: Binary faithful/hallucinated classification via response comparison

hallucination_classification.paper_reference: Multi-class hallucination labeling via response comparison

medical_qa.paper_reference: Standard QA comparison for medical concepts

extractive_qa.paper_reference: F1 token overlap for extractive QA via generation evaluator

longform_writing_quality.paper_reference: Semantic quality comparison for long-form text

search_augmented_qa.paper_reference: Standard QA answer comparison with search augmentation

personalized_alignment.paper_reference: Semantic comparison to preferred response for alignment

safety_refusal.paper_reference: DoNotAnswer uses BERT classifiers; HarmBench uses LLM judge; all compare response to expected refusal

safety_classification.paper_reference: WildGuard uses F1 on classification labels via generation evaluator

over_refusal.paper_reference: Compare response to expected helpful answer for benign prompts

selective_refusal.paper_reference: Compare to expected behavior based on context

agent_safety.paper_reference: ToolEmu uses LLM safety evaluator; AgentHarm checks compliance rate

value_alignment.paper_reference: FLAMES uses trained scorer for Chinese value alignment

multilingual_toxicity.paper_reference: Compare to non-toxic expected response across languages

web_browsing_accuracy.paper_reference: BrowseComp answer verification via semantic similarity

code_generation.paper_reference: All use test-case pass/fail execution for code verification

code_editing.paper_reference: Aider runs unit tests on edited code

code_efficiency.paper_reference: Mercury runs code and measures runtime efficiency

competitive_programming.paper_reference: Online judge execution for competitive programming

bash_generation.paper_reference: Execute and verify bash command output

scientific_computing.paper_reference: Execute and verify numerical output for scientific computing

math_olympiad.paper_reference: OlympiadBench uses automated scoring pipeline for open-ended math answers

function_calling.paper_reference: BFCL uses AST sub-string matching; exact match on structured output

table_qa.paper_reference: TAG compares exact answer values from SQL-based table QA

planning_reasoning.paper_reference: PlanBench parses action sequences and verifies against domain

planning_constraint_satisfaction.paper_reference: TravelPlanner uses evaluation scripts to check constraint satisfaction

agent_task.paper_reference: AgentBench verifies action sequences with exact match on expected outcome

agent_task_completion.paper_reference: tau-bench uses pass^k metric - binary task success exact match
